_source: DIETS-steward-export.txt PART 4 (Gold Standard Diet Posters, lines 976-1144) for the 10 species with verbatim blocks. Body-text sections for remaining 8 species.
_out_of_scope: Stingrays, fish, sharks — ZERO staff feeding per user directive.
Live prey species — snakes/amphibians/invertebrates — staff-prepared only, not morning feed-out.
Birds (giraffe/macaw/lorikeet) are hybrid guest-fed — separate addendum.

species.prep_rule: Whole presentation. No chopping, no mixing.
species.morning_feed: Whole hay pile. Greens in large leaves, stems intact. No chopping.
species.encounter_portion: Pulled fistfuls of hay or whole leafy stems for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.prep_rule: No cutting. No mixing.
species.morning_feed: Whole hay pile. Greens in large leaves, stems intact. No chopping.
species.encounter_portion: Pulled fistfuls of hay or whole leafy stems for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.prep_rule: Whole presentation.
species.morning_feed: Whole hay pile. Greens in large leaves, stems intact. No chopping.
species.encounter_portion: Pulled fistfuls of hay or whole leafy stems for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.prep_rule: Whole hay. No chopping.
species.morning_feed: Whole hay pile. Greens in large leaves, stems intact. No chopping.
species.encounter_portion: Pulled fistfuls of hay or whole leafy stems for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.prep_rule: Whole hay. No chopping.
species.morning_feed: Whole hay pile. Greens in large leaves, stems intact. No chopping.
species.encounter_portion: Pulled fistfuls of hay or whole leafy stems for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.prep_rule: Whole leaves. Chow in base.
species.morning_feed: Whole leaves, browse branches. Keep stems — they're enrichment.
species.encounter_portion: Single leaves or short stem sections for keeper-guided offering.

species.prep_rule: Whole leaves.
species.morning_feed: Whole leaves, browse branches. Keep stems — they're enrichment.
species.encounter_portion: Single leaves or short stem sections for keeper-guided offering.

species.prep_rule: Chunked fruit. Whole leaves.
species.morning_feed: Fruit in 2-3 inch chunks. Softbill/primate chow as prescribed.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized cubes (1/2 inch) for hand or tong delivery. Part of daily allocation, not extra.

species.prep_rule: Chunked fruit. Whole leaves. No citrus.
species.morning_feed: Fruit in 2-3 inch chunks. Softbill/primate chow as prescribed.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized cubes (1/2 inch) for hand or tong delivery. Part of daily allocation, not extra.

species.prep_rule: Chunked fruit. Whole leaves. No citrus.
species.morning_feed: Fruit in 2-3 inch chunks. Softbill/primate chow as prescribed.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized cubes (1/2 inch) for hand or tong delivery. Part of daily allocation, not extra.

species.prep_rule: Chunked fruit. Low-iron softbill chow only.
species.morning_feed: Fruit in 2-3 inch chunks. Softbill/primate chow as prescribed.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized cubes (1/2 inch) for hand or tong delivery. Part of daily allocation, not extra.
species.notes: Historical reference. No current LIFE site has Toco toucan as of v2026.04.23. Houston has keel-billed — see separate card.

species.prep_rule: Chunked fruit.
species.morning_feed: Fruit in 2-3 inch chunks. Softbill/primate chow as prescribed.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized cubes (1/2 inch) for hand or tong delivery. Part of daily allocation, not extra.

species.prep_rule: Protein measured per SOP. Greens whole.
species.morning_feed: Main components whole or in large chunks. Minimal processing.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized pieces of approved items for guided interaction.

species.prep_rule: Commercial insectivore diet per SOP.
species.morning_feed: Insect diet in flat bowl. Live feeders per SOP.
species.encounter_portion: Live feeders offered by tongs during keeper encounter. Count toward daily allocation.
species.notes: Historical reference. No current LIFE site has nine-banded as of v2026.04.23. See three-banded + six-banded cards for live species.

species.prep_rule: Whole leaves. Root in chunks.
species.morning_feed: Whole roots or halved large roots. Leafy greens whole.
species.encounter_portion: Root chunks (1 inch) for hand-feeding during encounter.

simple_build: Balanced distribution of fruit, greens, chow
species.prep_rule: Chunked fruit. Whole leaves. No citrus.
species.three_second_check: Do I see fruit AND greens AND chow?
species.morning_feed: Balanced bowl: fruit chunks, whole greens, chow as prescribed.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized cubes. Forage scatter permitted if keeper supervises.

species.prep_rule: Whole hay. No other items.
species.three_second_check: Do I see hay — and only hay?
species.source_line: User directive: 'Tortoises eat HAY ONLY — no greens, veg, fruit'
species.directive_override: User directive overrides any other document suggesting greens.
species.morning_feed: Grass hay pile only. No supplementation.
species.encounter_portion: Whole hay handfuls for hand-feeding. Nothing else.

species.prep_rule: Whole leaves. Live feeders per SOP.
species.morning_feed: Main components whole or in large chunks. Minimal processing.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized pieces of approved items for guided interaction.

wrong: High-sugar fruit heavy · Iron-rich foods · Pellet heavy
species.prep_rule: Chunked fruit (2" pieces). Low-iron softbill chow only. Limit banana/mango/papaya to trace amounts — these cause loose stool in keel-billed.
species.three_second_check: Do I see berries/pear — not banana?
species.morning_feed: Fruit in 2" chunks, lower-sugar bias (berries/apple/pear lead). Softbill chow in separate bowl. Fruit visible and dominant.
species.encounter_portion: 1/2" cubes of approved lower-sugar fruits for tong delivery. Never hand-feed banana or mango — even a small piece can cause loose stool.
species.daily_weight: ~120–180 g fruit + chow (keeper posts exact portion)
species.source_line: DIETS-steward-export PART 7 §1C (frugivore low-iron) + Mia Ketsa field note (keel-billed sugar sensitivity)
species.notes: Keeper note (Mia, 4/22/26): 'Keel-billed are a little more sensitive to higher sugar diets — gives em the runs.' Lock low-sugar bias.

wrong: Fruit heavy · Vegetable bowls · Large pieces
species.prep_rule: Insectivore diet in flat shallow bowl. Live feeders (mealworms/crickets) per keeper SOP.
species.three_second_check: Do I see insect diet — not fruit?
species.notes: All LIFE sites have three-banded (per Mia, 4/22/26). No site has nine-banded at present. Nine-banded card retained in master binder for historical reference / future arrivals.
species.morning_feed: Insect diet in flat bowl. Live feeders per SOP.
species.encounter_portion: Live feeders offered by tongs during keeper encounter. Count toward daily allocation.

correct: Insect dominant + fruit + veg + small protein
wrong: Fruit only · Insect only · Commercial cat/dog food
species.prep_rule: Insect portion in one bowl, mixed fruit/veg/protein in second. Chop fruit/veg to 1/2" cubes.
species.three_second_check: Do I see insects AND some fruit/veg?
species.source_line: DIETS-steward-export PART 7 §1E (insectivore baseline) + published AZA nutrition standards for Euphractus sexcinctus
species.notes: SAA-only species per Mia, 4/22/26. True omnivore — significantly broader diet than three-banded. Requires keeper confirmation of exact ratio before going live.
species.morning_feed: Main components whole or in large chunks. Minimal processing.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized pieces of approved items for guided interaction.

wrong: Dry pellets only · Iceberg lettuce · Citrus
species.prep_rule: Gut-loaded live feeders dusted with calcium + D3 per SOP. Greens and fruit chopped small and scattered for foraging. Fresh water daily.
species.source_line: AZA Reptile TAG nutrition guidelines (Physignathus cocincinus) + keeper SOP
species.notes: Species confirmation pending — placeholder portion/site data. Requires keeper sign-off before print.
species.morning_feed: Greens dominant, protein/fruit minor. Chopped to fit mouth size.
species.encounter_portion: Targeted single-piece feeding by tongs during keeper encounter.

species.what_this_animal_is: Arboreal insectivore with small plant supplement
wrong: Fruit heavy · Dead insects · Commercial chow
species.prep_rule: Live feeders only — crickets, roaches, silkworms per SOP. Gut-load 24–48h prior. Dust calcium daily, D3 2x/week. Mist branches — chameleons drink droplets, not standing water.
species.three_second_check: Do I see live, moving feeders?
species.source_line: AZA Reptile TAG + ARAV veterinary nutrition standards (Chamaeleo calyptratus)
species.notes: NOT a morning-feed species — live feeders offered during keeper SOP only. Cross-listed on master for completeness.
species.morning_feed: Insect diet in flat bowl. Live feeders per SOP.
species.encounter_portion: Live feeders offered by tongs during keeper encounter. Count toward daily allocation.

wrong: Fruit · Commercial tortoise pellets · High-protein greens
species.prep_rule: Whole hay pile. Fresh grasses cut long. Greens whole. NO fruit — leopard tortoises are strict grazers; fruit causes diarrhea and shell issues.
species.three_second_check: Do I see grass hay — and NO fruit?
species.source_line: AZA Chelonian TAG + Sulcata/Leopard nutrition guidelines
species.notes: Similar to sulcata — NO fruit rule is firm. Mia / keeper to confirm site availability before print.
species.morning_feed: Whole hay pile. Greens in large leaves, stems intact. No chopping.
species.encounter_portion: Pulled fistfuls of hay or whole leafy stems for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.

species.prep_rule: Whole leaves. Rotate greens to prevent oxalate buildup. Fresh water daily. NO cruciferous excess (limit kale to 1–2x/week).
species.three_second_check: Do I see mixed leafy greens?
species.source_line: AZA Chelonian TAG + Testudo nutrition standards
species.notes: Smaller than sulcata/leopard — separate portion chart. Avoid oxalate-heavy greens (spinach, beet greens).
species.morning_feed: Grass hay pile only. No supplementation.
species.encounter_portion: Whole hay handfuls for hand-feeding. Nothing else.

species.what_this_animal_is: Amazonian forest tortoise — more frugivorous than grassland species
wrong: Hay only · High-protein daily · Dog food
species.prep_rule: Fruit in 1" chunks. Greens whole. Trace protein (cooked egg, mazuri pellet) 1–2x/week only. Humid environment — mist enclosure daily.
species.source_line: AZA Chelonian TAG + Chelonoidis denticulatus nutrition standards
species.notes: IMPORTANT: Yellow-foot is rainforest, NOT grassland. Fruit IS appropriate — do not apply sulcata/leopard 'NO fruit' rule. Humidity 70–80%.
species.morning_feed: Main components whole or in large chunks. Minimal processing.
species.encounter_portion: Bite-sized pieces of approved items for guided interaction.

_changes: Added morning_feed + encounter_portion + daily_weight fields to all species
Added 8 new species: keel-billed toucan, southern 3-banded armadillo, six-banded armadillo, chinese water dragon, veiled chameleon, leopard tortoise, russian tortoise, yellow-foot tortoise
Marked toco_toucan and nine_banded_armadillo as historical (no current site)
